deep_dive.executive_summary: At $15.69, Marvin expects 6.3% per year over seven years. Bitmine Immersion Technologies is an Ethereum treasury vehicle holding 5.42 million ETH marked at $10.86 billion (May 31, 2026) against 579.7 million diluted shares after aggressive ATM issuance. Legacy immersion mining is immaterial; staking revenue is growing but nine-month general and administrative expense was $335.7 million. The stock trades below May filing ETH fair value per share, offering partial token-stack cushion but not protection from unbounded dilution. Stance watch (below mid-teens accumulate hurdle).

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.

investment_committee.strongest_dissent: The discount to May ETH marks is a rational price for an equity-financed dilution vehicle: management funds token purchases by issuing shares faster than ETH per share compounds, so the scarce asset on the balance sheet does not translate into a fixed pro-rata common claim.
unresolved_items: BMNP preferred stock conversion terms and post-May 2026 ATM dilution pace reconciled to net ETH per fully diluted common share after all senior claims.
Post-May 2026 ATM share issuance and ETH-per-diluted-share reconciled to BMNP preferred conversion and warrant waterfall.
Quantified post-May 2026 ATM issuance pace and BMNP preferred-stock waterfall per diluted common share, without which per-share asset realization cannot be bounded.

decision.next_action: Close critical evidence gaps before freezing a decision-grade packet.

committee.strongest_dissent: The discount to May ETH marks is a rational price for an equity-financed dilution vehicle: management funds token purchases by issuing shares faster than ETH per share compounds, so the scarce asset on the balance sheet does not translate into a fixed pro-rata common claim.
unresolved_items: BMNP preferred stock conversion terms and post-May 2026 ATM dilution pace reconciled to net ETH per fully diluted common share after all senior claims.
Post-May 2026 ATM share issuance and ETH-per-diluted-share reconciled to BMNP preferred conversion and warrant waterfall.
Quantified post-May 2026 ATM issuance pace and BMNP preferred-stock waterfall per diluted common share, without which per-share asset realization cannot be bounded.

gaps.acceptance_test: The committee item is explicitly closed, sourced, and reflected in the valuation range or documented as immaterial.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

drivers.label: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution

attribution.explanation: Component changes are classified from observable differences in quantity, comparable method, probability, timing, capital, evidence, and schedule scope.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

components.assumption_summary: Small operating annuity from staking yield; legacy mining immaterial. Proof in calculation_proof.
components.cross_check: Reconcile to revenue segment table and corporate burn before promoting to base IRR.

components.label: Warrants, deferred tax, and preferred-claim reserve
components.assumption_summary: Reserve for senior claims and tax on unrealized crypto gains; base zero pending preferred waterfall. Proof in calculation_proof.
components.cross_check: Update when preferred conversion terms and ATM pace clarify dilution stack.

economic_value.accounting_reference: ETH marked to fair value under ASU 2023-08 on the balance sheet (~$18.76/sh at May 31, 2026); GAAP net income is mark-dominated ($9.04B unrealized loss nine months FY2026) and not used for Lawrence owner cash.

economic_claim.description: One diluted common share of Bitmine Immersion Technologies, including look-through ETH treasury at fair value, seven-year ETH trajectory net of ATM dilution, capitalized staking yield, and reserves for warrants, deferred tax, and preferred claims.
economic_claim.unit_source: 579,652,432 common shares issued and outstanding at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026 cover page)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: No operating enterprise debt at scale; equity equals digital assets at fair value plus cash less warrant, deferred tax, and preferred claims. ETH trajectory and staking are incremental to static look-through; G&A burn is reflected in Lawrence operating segments, not double-counted here.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
valuation_proof.evidence: $10.856B ETH fair value divided by 579,652,432 shares at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026 digital asset table). Low case applies ~40% ETH mark haircut from May marks.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low case applies ETH mark haircut; high case modest premium to May marks.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: Unique overlap key eth_look_through_today; no other component capitalizes the same claim.
valuation_proof.falsifier: ETH fair value per share falls below the low case after sustained spot decline and further dilution.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution
valuation_proof.evidence: Base aligns with scenarios.base.sotp_build eth_growth_net_dilution (+$4.5/sh): 8% ETH CAGR for 7 years offset by 10% cumulative ATM dilution [Assumption]. Bear embeds dilution exceeding token appreciation.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Probability, timing, and dilution pace are inside the range.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: Unique overlap key eth_trajectory_net_dilution; no other component capitalizes the same claim.
valuation_proof.falsifier: ATM issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than token price rises for two consecutive quarters.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Seven-year Lawrence horizon aligned with yield-curve stance gate.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes moderate ETH appreciation with partial dilution offset; bear assumes dilution dominates.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Further ATM issuance is the primary remaining owner-funded dilution risk.

valuation_proof.evidence: Nine-month FY2026 staking and validation revenue $56.924M on 579.7M shares; modest margin capitalized at 10 times [Assumption] in base payoff build.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Does not double-count ETH fair value; yield is incremental operating cash.
valuation_proof.overlap_control: Unique overlap key staking_and_legacy_cash; no other component capitalizes the same claim.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Staking yield falls below corporate G&A drag for two reporting periods.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Warrants, deferred tax, and preferred-claim reserve
valuation_proof.evidence: Warrant liability $2.1M and deferred tax liability $92.3M at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026); BMNP preferred stock claims not fully modeled [HUMAN REVIEW].
valuation_proof.adjustment: Negative additive; preferred waterfall pending [HUMAN REVIEW].
valuation_proof.overlap_control: Unique overlap key warrants_tax_preferred_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Preferred or warrant conversion materially reduces common look-through below the low case.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_decision.next_action: Close critical evidence gaps before freezing a decision-grade packet.

timeline.label: Tom Lee executive chairman published investor presentation on ETH treasury strategy (Reg FD 8-K)
ETH holdings reached 5,416,945 units at $10.86B fair value; shares outstanding 579.7M after ATM issuance
Subsequent ATM and private placement activity disclosed after FY2025 year-end; continued equity funding of treasury
Private placement of 5,217,715 common shares under securities purchase agreement to fund digital asset purchases
Year-end ETH treasury 1,874,927 units ($8.26B fair value) and BTC 192 units; FY2025 revenue $6.1M
Thomas J. Lee appointed executive chairman; board leadership change tied to ETH treasury strategy
Management reoriented business to ETH treasury operations; initiated BTC treasury then broadened to ETH in late June 2025
June 2025 public offering closed; proceeds deployed to initiate BTC treasury (~154 BTC) and fund ETH pivot
Underwriting agreement with ThinkEquity for 2.25M share offering to fund digital asset strategy
Prior strategy focused on immersion-cooled bitcoin self-mining, hosting, and mining equipment sales (FY2025 revenue $6.1M)
ROC Digital mining joint venture and immersion container assets (legacy structure pre-treasury pivot)
Company public reporting history as Bitmine Immersion Technologies (immersion mining focus)

industry.structure: Ethereum treasury issuers compete with ETFs, private funds, and other listed vehicles (e.g., Strategy for BTC) for incremental crypto allocation; no operating moat, funding cost driven by equity market appetite.
industry.share_shift: BMNR scaled ETH holdings from ~1.9M to ~5.4M units between August 2025 and May 2026 via ATM and private placements, but per-share economics depend on issuance pace versus ETH price.
industry.trend: Post-2025 pivot from immersion bitcoin mining to ETH treasury and staking; GAAP earnings dominated by fair-value marks under ASU 2023-08.

top_claims.claim: Basic EPS moved -90.3% versus the prior period (13.6 to 1.3).
BITMINE IMMERSION TECHNOLOGIES, INC. reported an insider purchase of 86,956,513 shares ($77,043,471).
EPS (basic) growth moved from -19.2% to +51.6% YoY in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

At $15.69, Marvin expects 6.3% per year over seven years. Bitmine Immersion Technologies is an Ethereum treasury vehicle holding 5.42 million ETH marked at $10.86 billion (May 31, 2026) against 579.7 million diluted shares after aggressive ATM issuance. Legacy immersion mining is immaterial; staking revenue is growing

risk_claims.claim: Basic EPS moved -90.3% versus the prior period (13.6 to 1.3).
*Primary risk: Continued ATM and private placement issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than the token price appreciates, destroying look-through value even in a rising ETH market.

*Lens failure mode (levered): If issuance pauses and ETH per share stabilizes, the current discount to May 2026 ETH fair value could mean revert; if issuance accelerates, the equity becomes a financing vehicle, not a treasury.
